title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.710 - Blank cartridges not to be fired, when — penalty
text:
41.710.  Blank cartridges not to be fired, when — penalty. — No member of the militia called out to sustain the civil authorities shall issue any order for the firing of blank cartridges upon any mob or assembly or under any pretense, or in compliance with any order, fire blank cartridges upon any mob or unlawful assembly under penalty of being dishonorably dismissed, or discharged.
(L. 1951 p. 654 § 70)
